targets.query: SELECT mean("n_users") FROM "system" WHERE "host" =~ /^$metaID$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean("n_cpus") FROM "system" WHERE "host" =~ /^$hostmeta$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean("total") FROM "mem" WHERE "host" =~ /^$hostmeta$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($interval) fill(null)
SELECT 100-last(available_percent) FROM "mem" WHERE "host" =~ /^$hostmeta$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean(load1) as load1,mean(load5) as load5,mean(load15) as load15 FROM "system" WHERE host =~ /$hostmeta$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($interval), * ORDER BY asc
SELECT 100 - mean("usage_idle") FROM "cpu" WHERE ("cpu" =~ /cpu[0-9].*/ AND "host" =~ /^$hostmeta$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "cpu" fill(null)
SELECT mean("available") FROM "mem" WHERE ("host" =~ /^$metaID$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

panels.description: Number of clients currently subscribed for inode invalidations on this meta node.
panels.title: Subscribed Clients

panels.description: Number of inodes currently cached in the meta server's inode store.
panels.title: Inodes cached at Meta

panels.description: Rate of inode invalidations sent from this meta to clients (per-second derivative of the cumulative counter, summed across clients).

targets.query: SELECT sum("rate") FROM (SELECT non_negative_derivative(max("numInvalidations"), 1s) AS "rate" FROM "invalWatchPerClient" WHERE "nodeNumID" =~ /^$metaID$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "clientId" fill(null)) GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

panels.title: Inode Invalidation Rate (all clients)

list.definition: show tag values from meta with key = "nodeNumID"
list.label: Meta ID
list.name: metaID
list.query: show tag values from meta with key = "nodeNumID"

list.definition: select last("hostnameid") from meta  where nodeNumID =~ /^$metaID$/ AND time > now() - 7d
list.label: Meta Host
list.name: hostmeta
list.query: select last("hostnameid") from meta  where nodeNumID =~ /^$metaID$/ AND time > now() - 7d
